title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at EPC Industrie International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at EPC Industrie International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
EPC Industrie International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Hyderabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About EPC Industrie International Enterprises:
EPC Industrie International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EPC Industrie International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
